memberdef.name: IS_SCHEMATRON
memberdef.initializer: ((node != NULL) && (node->type == XML_ELEMENT_NODE ) && \ (node->ns != NULL) && \ (xmlStrEqual(node->name, (const xmlChar *) elem)) && \ ((xmlStrEqual(node->ns->href, xmlSchematronNs)) || \ (xmlStrEqual(node->ns->href, xmlOldSchematronNs))))

memberdef.name: NEXT_SCHEMATRON
memberdef.initializer: while (node != NULL) { \ if ((node->type == XML_ELEMENT_NODE ) && (node->ns != NULL) && \ ((xmlStrEqual(node->ns->href, xmlSchematronNs)) || \ (xmlStrEqual(node->ns->href, xmlOldSchematronNs)))) \ break; \ node = node->next; \ }

briefdescription.para: A Schematron let variable.
A Schematrons test, either an assert or a report.
A Schematrons rule.
A Schematrons pattern.
Handle an out of memory condition.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlNodePtr node, int error, const char *msg, const xmlChar *str1, const xmlChar *str2)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronPErr

briefdescription.para: Handle a parser error.
Handle an out of memory condition.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronValidCtxtPtr ctxt, int error, const char *msg, const xmlChar *str1)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronVErr

briefdescription.para: Handle a validation error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchematronTestType type, xmlSchematronRulePtr rule, xmlNodePtr node, xmlChar *test, xmlChar *report)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronAddTest

briefdescription.para: Add a test to a schematron.

simplesect.para: the new pointer or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free a list of tests.
Free a list of let variables.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchematronPtr schema, xmlSchematronPatternPtr pat, xmlNodePtr node, xmlChar *context, xmlChar *report)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronAddRule

briefdescription.para: Add a rule to a schematron.

simplesect.para: the new pointer or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free a list of rules.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronParserCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchematronPtr schema, xmlNodePtr node, xmlChar *name)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronAddPattern

briefdescription.para: Add a pattern to a schematron.

simplesect.para: the new pointer or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free a list of patterns.
Allocate a new Schematron structure.

simplesect.para: the newly allocated structure or NULL in case or error

briefdescription.para: Deallocate a Schematron structure.
Create an XML Schematrons parse context for that file/resource expected to contain an XML Schematrons file.

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML Schematrons parse context for that memory buffer expected to contain an XML Schematrons file.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a char array containing the schemas

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Create an XML Schematrons parse context for that document.

detaileddescription.para: NB. The document may be modified during the parsing process.

simplesect.para: the parser context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the resources associated to the schema parser context.
Add a namespace definition in the context.
Format the message content of the assert or report test.
parse a rule element
parse a pattern element
parse a schema definition resource and build an internal XML Schema structure which can be used to validate instances.

simplesect.para: the internal XML Schematron structure built from the resource or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Output part of the report to whatever channel the user selected.
Build the string being reported to the user.

simplesect.para: a report string or NULL in case of error. The string needs to be deallocated by the caller

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronValidCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchematronTestPtr test, xmlNodePtr cur, xmlSchematronPatternPtr pattern, int success)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronReportSuccess

briefdescription.para: called from the validation engine when an assert or report test have been done.
called from the validation engine when starting to check a pattern
Set the structured error callback.
Create an XML Schematrons validation context based on the given schema.

simplesect.para: the validation context or NULL in case of error

briefdescription.para: Free the resources associated to the schema validation context.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronValidCtxtPtr ctxt, xmlSchematronTestPtr test, xmlDocPtr instance, xmlNodePtr cur, xmlSchematronPatternPtr pattern)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronRunTest

briefdescription.para: Validate a rule against a tree instance at a given position.

parameterdescription.para: the current node in the instance

simplesect.para: 1 in case of success, 0 if error and -1 in case of internal error

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlSchematronValidCtxtPtr vctxt, xmlXPathContextPtr ctxt, xmlSchematronLetPtr let, xmlDocPtr instance, xmlNodePtr cur)
memberdef.name: xmlSchematronRegisterVariables

briefdescription.para: Registers a list of let variables to the current context of cur
Unregisters a list of let variables from the context.
Validate a tree instance against the schematron.

simplesect.para: 0 in case of success, -1 in case of internal error and an error count otherwise.
